response.justification: While the candidate has broad engineering experience and some exposure to agentic workflows, they lack the required 5+ years of senior technical leadership in scale-up fintech environments, have no demonstrable production experience with multi-agent AI systems in financial contexts, and their recent career gap and limited exposure to regulated fintech infrastructure, real-time credit systems, or engineering leadership at scale disqualify them from meeting core requirements.
strengths: Experienced in full-stack development with TypeScript/Node.js and event-driven systems
Has contributed to AI-agent infrastructure and built open-source tooling (e.g., GISCollective)
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling
concerns: No evidence of leading engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or building senior technical leadership layers
No demonstrated production experience in fintech, credit risk, or regulated AI systems
Recent career gap and lack of focus on distributed systems, real-time inference, or LLM infrastructure at scale
